label: Psychic ritual -- chronophagy
description: Ritual where the invoker psychically consumes years of the target's biological age, transferring them to themselves.

yearsTransferredFromQualityRange.label: Years transferred from quality range
yearsTransferredFromQualityRange.description: Range of biological years transferred from target to invoker, lerped through by ritual quality.

brainDamageFromAgeCurve.label: Brain damage from age curve
brainDamageFromAgeCurve.description: Curve mapping the target's age to the brain damage inflicted.
